name: Rum Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 325°F.
2. Grease and flour a 10-cup bundt pan.
3. Sprinkle chopped pecans in the bottom of the pan.
4. Pour batter made from water, cake mix, pudding mixture, eggs, oil, and rum over the nuts.
5. Bake for 1 hour or until a toothpick inserted into the center comes out clean. Cool on a rack.
6. Invert the cooled cake onto a serving plate.
7. For the glaze: Melt butter and sugar in a saucepan over low heat, stirring constantly. Add water and rum, continuing to stir until all ingredients are combined.
8. Using an ice pick or small spoon, make several holes in the top of the cake through the nut coating.
9. Drizzle the glaze over the cake, allowing it to soak in before serving.
Note: The cake will be very moist inside and is better the next day. Enjoy with espresso or other after-dinner liqueur.
